enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Who Am I'?

The song explores themes of self-identity and introspection, asking the listener to reflect on their own existence.

How does 'Who Am I' fit into the plot of the movie Vaanam?

In Vaanam, the song represents the protagonist's journey of self-discovery amidst challenges.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Benny Dayal and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was 'Who Am I' released?

The song was released on March 23, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Who Am I, the protagonist grapples with questions of identity and purpose, set against a backdrop of energetic beats and vibrant melodies. The song encapsulates the spirit of celebration and self-exploration, making it a perfect anthem for those seeking motivation. With Benny Dayal's captivating vocals, the track evokes feelings of empowerment and joy. It resonates with anyone who has ever pondered their place in the world.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Who Am I from Vaanam is an electrifying anthem that captures the essence of self-discovery and celebration. With Benny Dayal's dynamic vocals and Yuvan's infectious beats, this track is sure to get you moving. Dive into the vibrant world of Tamil music with this unforgettable hit!
stanzaMeanings: Singer: Benny Dayal, Song: Who Am I, Movie: Vaanam

1 2 3, let's rock... Hit It... Every day I look in the mirror and ask myself, who am I? For a moment I smile, then I cry. I am lost in a dream, who am I? I burn in the fire, who am I? I live in desires, who am I? I plant dreams, and I also make mistakes. I ask God, oh baby...
Who am I, Who am I, Who am I, Who am I, Who am I? Who am I, Who am I, Who am I, Who am I, Who am I?
Birth and death... I think about the achievements that happen. I want to remove the worries of hunger. I am creating everything within me.

... what should I say, what does my heart say? What should I say about myself, I don't understand anything. Who am I, Who am I, Who am I, Who am I, Who am I? Who am I, Who am I, Who am I, Who am I, Who am I?
I think that I have no friends, I consider myself a friend. I think that I have no enemies, I see myself as a rival.
I wonder if I will win, I wonder if I will lose. I don't understand anything about myself. Who am I, Who am I, Who am I, Who am I, Who am I? Who am I, Who am I, Who am I, Who am I, Who am I?

Every day I look in the mirror and ask myself, who am I? For a moment I smile, then I cry. I am lost in a dream, who am I? I burn in the fire, who am I? I live in desires, who am I? I plant dreams, and I also make mistakes. I ask God, oh baby...
Who am I, Who am I, Who am I, Who am I, Who am I? Who am I, Who am I, Who am I, Who am I, Who am I?
